title: Intäktsras och vinstfall för Sivers: "Förväntningarna större än pipeline"
summary_md:
# Intäktsras och vinstfall för Sivers: "Förväntningarna större än pipeline"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-29  
**Market Sentiment**: Negative

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode centers on Sivers Semiconductors' Q1 report, which showed crashing revenues (Photonics -32%, Wireless -16%) and a worsened adjusted result of -13.8 MSEK, despite the stock having rocketed ~1600% this year to a 21 billion SEK market cap. Guest journalist Sven Nordström and host Uffe describe it as the most extreme, future-leaning valuation they can recall — comparable to or beyond the IT bubble of 1999 — driven by US inflows and X hype rather than fundamentals. Management points to a pipeline up 77% to 799 MSEK, but the panel concludes the report does not support the price.

---

## Universe Stocks

### ⛔ SIVE — Sivers Semiconductors | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 65%

Stock up ~1600% YTD to 21-25 bn SEK while Q1 revenues crashed and result worsened; valuation priced years ahead with weak near-term support.

#### Reasoning

Guest Sven Nordström calls it the most exceptional, optimistic and forward-leaning valuation he can recall — possibly exceeding the IT bubble. Host Uffe agrees, noting the report shows nothing supporting the price after a tenfold rise. Revenue fell (Photonics -32%, Wireless -16%), adjusted result -13.8 MSEK. The bull case rests entirely on a pipeline up 77% to 799 MSEK and US/X-driven inflows rather than delivered results.

#### Sell Triggers

- if pipeline fails to convert into actual orders/revenue
- if reported revenue continues to decline in coming quarters
- if US inflows/hype reverse
- if no concrete US listing materialises

> *"Det är ju att det är den mest exceptionella, den mest optimistiska och framåtlutade värdering som jag kan påminna mig om. Alltså någonsin."*

---
